test_cases.title: Verify respawn works during normal team deathmatch flow
test_cases.precondition: A team deathmatch session has started with valid teams assigned.
steps: Trigger or use respawn during normal gameplay.
Observe team state, UI, and gameplay flow.
test_cases.expected_result: respawn should work correctly during normal team deathmatch gameplay.

test_cases.title: Verify respawn handles respawn or score issues correctly
test_cases.precondition: A TDM match is active with score tracking and respawn enabled.
steps: Use respawn before a death, kill, or respawn event.
Trigger repeated kills, deaths, or score updates.
Observe respawn logic and score behavior.
test_cases.expected_result: respawn should not break respawn logic or scoring behavior.

test_cases.title: Verify respawn remains stable under repeated kills and respawns
test_cases.precondition: Players can repeatedly enter combat and respawn in the same TDM session.
steps: Play repeated combat loops with frequent kills and respawns.
Observe whether the feature remains stable over time.
test_cases.expected_result: respawn should remain stable across repeated combat and respawn cycles.
